park_name: Port Neill Cabin and Caravan Park

reviews.review_text: A nice Caravan park, short walk 🚶‍♂️ to the Hotel, clean amenities, friendly staff  !!!

I booked for 3 nights & stayed for 2. On arrival there was no one in the office. A man was spraying weeds & abruptly told me to set my van up on site 23, my booking was marked 20. There was only 1 other van in the park and that was next to me. No offer of a more private site, it was undulating & hard to get my van level. The amenities are old but usable and my site did have lawn. There is no sea views, all obstructed my cabins. Not a good caravan park, I won't be back there!
Good spot
Great little caravan park. Sites are a great size. Plenty of room. Easy walking distance to Jetty,shop, and pub.
We booked an unpowered site. Staff very accommodating and helpful. Use of bbq's eating areas great. Toilets and showers very clean. What an enjoyable experience.

2nd time we have stayed at this beautiful park.
Cant speak more highly of the managers ,and so accomodating. We wanted to stay an extra night and nothing was too much trouble . Awesome facilities , so clean and tidy.
WELL DONE . 10/10
Cant wait to come and stay again.
Dan and Julie Hausler

So thankful that we were able to secure a last minute site at this park. Fantastic location, beautiful views. Fantastic ammenities. The staff were so warm and welcoming..
Can’t wait for our next stay.

No complaints here! Booked online, paperwork ready to go on arrival with site and park details. No standing in a long line.
Pet friendly, lawned sites, clean amenities.
Behind a row of shacks, but had access to beachfront. This was actually good for a windbreak.
Coffee van there each day for all your caffeine needs!
Nice little park, quiet, close to beach ect. Walk to the pub. Friendly operators. Will go back.
Some sites were on grass. Very old amenities block. Couldn't see the water from our sites as houses and fence obscured our view

Quie spot, best nights sleep of our adventure.
Staff were lovely, showers super hot, amenities very clean..  PERFECT pit stop

Had the best time ever! Quiet and clean and tidy. Stayed on a grassed site and easy access to Amenities. Great location lovely walks to be had to the beach or the Wharf area. Great pub too. Wonderful hosts very obliging, nothing is a worry. Can’t wait to go back again

The lad on site seems to be a top bloke very helpful. Sites present well with manicured grass to step onto exiting your van. Toilets and shower clean and tidy and no locks or codes required which is great. Short stroll to the beach and Jetty. Weather was very windy when we were here however it would be nice on a better day. 10 out of 10 from us and recommend 100%.
Great place to stay, friendly helpful staff. Out of the way and quiet. Bowls club next door has evening meals on Thursday nights

The Caretakers made our stay so comfortable and welcoming. They really care for the Park and their Customers.  Would recommend staying here any time. Park is clean and tidy and there is good fishing off the Jetty
Had a good stay, prices were good. Dog friendly sites.
Lovely stay, had it to our own selves this weekend 😀 Great location 👍🏼 Ammeneties are on the tired side, need upgrading.

Great little caravan park with easy access to the beach.  A combination of permanent sites and holiday ones, both grass and gravel.  Our site was a little steep back to front so had to be creative when leveling the van. Amenities were tired and in need of a little TLC but clean and tidy so very serviceable.  Water pressure could be a bit iffy if all 3 showers were being used at the same time.  The boys had a great time squidding off the rocks at the boat ramp. We enjoyed our time there and would go back.

poor customer service. Went to purchase some hot chips for the family, was given the paper bag overflowing with chips and politely asked if it could be place into a bag as I had rode my bike to the shop. I was then told that i must pay 10 cents for the bag, which used to be free with purchase! and then i was given a lecture that I can’t use the card to pay 10 cents as there is a $10 minimum and that next time i have to tell them before I order I want a bag? not the kind of community service that use to exist in this town.
Very relaxing and comfortable spot
Nice park very quiet. Short distance to all in town.

This is a gem of a caravan park.  Nestled in between Cowell, Tumby Bay, and Cleve, it is a great spot to set up and explore the surrounding coastline.  Walking distance to the water, and jetty with some sites having a waterview.  We stayed here for 2 weeks just before the mad Christmas/School holidays  rush, and it was quiet.    Amenities are always clean and water hot. Potable water but rainwater available . Pet friendly.  Dinner at the Community Club on a Thursday night is a must, as is lunch and coffee at the cafe.
Had a great stay. Good spot to base and explore from.  No tv and extremely poor mobile reception are a bit of a let down.
Friendly staff old place but clean
We stayed for a week and it was great clean amenities friendly staff we will return again thanks guys from Dave and tracy
